summary: Two buildings assessed show NO DAMAGE with CONFIRMED confidence; both facades are intact, windows undamaged, and no structural deformation or debris is visible. The overall scene depicts a city street with traffic and large buildings under an overcast sky, showing no signs of recent destruction or impact. Based on the prior assessments, there is no evidence of functional disruption to the buildings, suggesting normal operational status.
